calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-25-2015 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed, the Court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. JUDGE JOHN K. STEWART; Clerk EBura; Proceedings not reported. (610)

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Mar-25-2013 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Mar-24-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day for settlement on the record.
Dept. 206, Judge: CYNTHIA M. LEE; Clerk: JIRoque; Reporter: Sonia Wong, CSR #11288.

Matthew W. Quall, Esq. for the plaintiff Wells Fargo Bank, N.A.
Maria Alfaro, Defendant in Pro Per. (Accompanied by son, Hector, as Spanish interpreter.)

Case settled. Settlement agreement signed by the parties, but not filed. Plaintiff is to pay the sum of $9,000.00 at $400.00 per month, for 22 months. For further details of the settlement, refer to the terms placed on the record as stated by Mr. Quall and agreed by all the parties.

Matter is deemed settled and placed on the CRC Dismissal calendar in Dept. 610 on MAR-24-2015 at 10:30 AM.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-13-2012 Set For Trial On Mar-25-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Order Deeming Pltf'S First Set Of Requests For Admission Admitted Propounded On Deft Rene Alfaro; Request For Sanctions And Order Thereon; Declaration Of Lisa E Spiwak; P&A In Support Thereof (Ccp Sections 2033.280; 2023.010)
Off Calendar Oct-11-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Maria A. Alfaro, Defendant in pro per, who assisted with English/Spanish translation by her Grandson, Hector Martinez;
No appearance by any other party or counsel.

The Court ascertained that Ms. Alfaro did notify Wells Fargo that she would be appearing today.

Ruling: The Court informed Ms. Alfaro of its tentative ruling which it was adopting as follows: PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A., A NATIONAL BANKING Motion For Order Deeming Plaintiff'S First Set Of Requests For Admission Admitted Propounded On Defendant Rene Alfaro; Request for Sanctions is DENIED. Plaintiff has served responses prior to the hearing on this motion. Sanctions are awarded in the amount of $497.50. Plaintiff shall pay the sanctions to Wells Fargo Bank, N.A. within 30 days of entry of this order. Order signed. Ernst Halperin, Judge Pro-Tem, Jacqueline Alameda, Clerk, Not Reported. =302/JPT
